items.headline: Tom has called 6 of 47 leads. Ever.
items.detail: Tom Activity Tracker revealed 46 out of 47 leads have NEVER been called. Last call logged March 26. This isn't a booking rate problem - it's an activity problem. The 9.8% DC booking rate has a name.

items.headline: $157K in open Stripe invoices. $15K is recoverable today.
items.detail: 226 open invoices total. 9 are active customers whose cards are failing ($15,412). 28 are recoverable 15-90 day ($20,891). Zombie/aged is write-off territory. Personal outreach on the active 9 = highest ROI call Harry can make.

items.headline: 3-email nurture sequence ready - 1,929 warm leads waiting.
items.detail: Lead nurture workflow (108241348) built in HubSpot. 3 emails over 72hrs for unbooked leads. Warm re-engagement sequence (3 emails to List 1021 - 1,929 leads) also ready. Conservative estimate: $28K revenue from warm list at 2.5% booking rate.

items.headline: Booking rate dropped to 5.4% this week (was 13.7% last week).
items.detail: 112 leads in, 6 booked. MTD still 11.7% (784 leads, 92 booked). The weekly trend is accelerating downward. Tom's inactivity is the direct cause - 46 leads sitting untouched.

items.headline: Price confidence = the close predictor. 3/3 closes, 4/4 misses.
items.detail: Every close last week had confident price delivery. Every miss had hesitant, absent, or caved pricing. Price Delivery Drill Card shipped to all reps. Anthony's OH regression (caved x2) is the emerging concern.

leo_actions: Tom accountability - activity tracker live (6pm daily cron). Today's email: zero calls flagged.
Speed-to-lead alerts firing every 15 mins for Tom's new leads. 32 backlog leads sent with call scripts.
Failed payment recovery engine running daily 9:30am. First auto-retry collected $119 (Stephanie Mckeown).
Retention call engine sending Harry top 5 families daily at 8:30am. 49 renewals in next 30 days.
